rationale: Educ. Code §29.356 governs application procedures and lottery priorities for an educational assistance program. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions, property tax appraised values, or Tax Code §11.13(b). No operative conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.356. APPLICATION TO PROGRAM. (a) A parent of an eligible child may apply to a certified educational assistance organization designated by the comptroller to enroll the child in the program for the following semester, term, or school year, as determined by the comptroller.
_note: No direct or indirect textual conflict between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this section's application-process provisions. Any fiscal impact on program funding would be indirect and is not addressed by this section's operative text.
